title: ADD SYNCHRONIZATION OF CONNECTION'S (TEAM WORK) VERY IMPORTANT!!!!!!!!!!!
author: Uzuvira

iterations.description: Implement synchronization of connection files for teamwork to enable collaborative use cases.
Bulk verified: commit cbac3c7a exists (HIGH confidence)

comments.author: kramttocs
comments.snippet: Have you looked into the SQL option? Our team has been using that for awhile now successfully. Just ensure you have frequent backups as the db has been wiped out twice with no known cause.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: That will be posible with connection and usr profiles implemented. Settings stay per app but elevated user (admin) will be able to set user profiles to provide what connection profile could be loaded. Access to profiles will be hold by ACL or AD identity

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): Implement synchronization of connection files for teamwork to enable collaborative use cases.
Approach: Design and implement a robust synchronization mechanism for connection files, including conflict resolution strategies and user interface elements for managing shared connections.
